steps.title: Set up the perimeter
steps.content: Let $x$ be the length of the third side. The two congruent sides are each $19$ feet, and the total perimeter is $66$ feet: $$19+19+x=66$$

steps.title: Solve for the third side
steps.content: The two congruent sides have total length $38$ feet, so $$x=66-38=28$$

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The third side is $28$ feet, so C is correct.
